name: valkyr-swarm
description: Install, diagnose, visualize, and operate tenant-scoped Valkyr SWARM agents with governed receipts.

interface.shortDescription: Install, diagnose, and operate tenant SWARM agents
interface.longDescription: Valkyr SWARM lets Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, ValorIDE, and other agents authenticate with a Valkyr Labs account, join the account's tenant-isolated SWARM, heartbeat continuously, diagnose local and live health, inspect graph topology and agent detail, receive capability-bounded commands, and expose governed receipts through MCP. Protected outbound sends, production deployments, and merges fail closed outside the canonical human-approval surface.
defaultPrompt: Join this agent to my Valkyr SWARM.
Show my SWARM graph and inspect an agent.
Diagnose this agent and verify its latest receipt.
